novel_features.name: Reputation summary
novel_features.description: One read-only dashboard for store-level review count, rating, shop metadata, settings, and local review stats.
novel_features.rationale: Combines multiple Judge.me widget/shop/settings endpoints with the local review mirror so operators can see trust health without stitching API calls manually.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use before campaigns or launch reviews to spot trust-presentation problems quickly.

novel_features.name: Product reputation hotspots
novel_features.description: Ranks synced products by low-rating rate, average rating, verified rate, and newest review recency.
novel_features.rationale: Uses the local SQLite review mirror to compute product-level quality risk across review history, not just wrap a single endpoint.
novel_features.example: judge-me-pp-cli sync --resources reviews --max-pages 1 && judge-me-pp-cli reputation products --agent
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use weekly to find products dragging down customer trust.

novel_features.name: Moderation attention queue
novel_features.description: Surfaces low-rated, hidden, spam-marked, or not-yet-curated synced reviews for human attention.
novel_features.rationale: Turns raw review metadata into a support/moderation queue while staying read-only and local-first.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use during support triage to prioritize reputation-impacting reviews.

novel_features.name: Trust settings audit
novel_features.description: Audits Judge.me settings that affect trust presentation, including autopublish, picture reviews, star color, and admin email presence when returned.
novel_features.rationale: Converts settings endpoint data into operator-facing trust findings instead of dumping raw settings.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use after setup or theme changes to confirm trust display configuration.

novel_features.name: Product evidence view
novel_features.description: Fetches product-level count/histogram evidence when product ID is known and widget availability/byte evidence for handles or external IDs.
novel_features.rationale: Combines review count endpoint calls with widget endpoints to give a product trust evidence packet without mutating reviews.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use before merchandising or ad pushes to verify product social proof is present.
